# Homebrew formula generated by goreleaser's brews: config, not a static committed Formula/dacli.rb
## Chose
Homebrew formula generated by goreleaser's brews: config, not a static committed Formula/dacli.rb
## Rejected
committing a static Formula/dacli.rb file in this repo as the 'tap template', or using this same repo as its own tap
## Because
GoReleaser's brews section in .goreleaser.yaml IS the formula template -- it renders the .rb file from build metadata (version, checksums, per-OS/arch archive URLs) at release time and pushes it to a dedicated tap repo (mlnomadpy/homebrew-tap), which is the standard Homebrew convention (a tap repo is expected to contain nothing but Formula/*.rb). A static formula committed here would need its version/sha256 fields hand-updated on every release and would drift immediately; goreleaser's version pins itself to git tags automatically.
